differential_diagnoses: Disseminated hidradenitis suppurativa with systemic involvement
Crohn's disease with metastatic cutaneous involvement
next_steps: Perform punch biopsy of the advancing edge of an ulcer for histopathology and tissue culture
Perform diagnostic paracentesis with fluid analysis and cytology
Consider screening for underlying inflammatory bowel disease (Crohn's) given family history and clinical presentation
Maintain broad-spectrum antibiotic coverage until definitive cultures return negative
Assess for pathergy phenomenon to guide invasive procedures
